events.label: assistant
events.text: I’m writing the assessment directly to `/app/answer.json` with a compliant pass decision because the field method matches OEM/engineering specs and project requirements.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "if [ -f /app/answer.json ]; then sed -n '1,200p' /app/answer.json; else printf 'NO_FILE\\n'; fi"
→ NO_FILE
